criteria_verification.criterion_text: Empty `__init__.py` files created in: agents/, tools/, prompts/
criteria_verification.evidence: Created empty __init__.py files in all three directories: agents/__init__.py, tools/__init__.py, prompts/__init__.py. The agents/ and tools/ files remain empty. The prompts/__init__.py was subsequently populated by another concurrent task (TASK-OEX-003) with prompt imports, which is expected in the multi-task autobuild system. All three files exist and all three directories are valid Python packages. Tests validate existence, emptiness (for agents/tools), and package structure.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
criteria_verification.evidence: All Python files created/modified by this task (tests/test_scaffold.py, agents/__init__.py, tools/__init__.py) pass both 'ruff check' and 'ruff format --check' with zero errors. Non-Python files (pyproject.toml, .env.example, langgraph.json, .gitignore) are not subject to Python linting. Ruff is configured in pyproject.toml with target-version='py311', line-length=120, and select=['E','F','I','W'].
